message:
refactor(interactive): apply let-chains for cleaner conditional logic

Modernize Select widget code using Rust let-chains (RFC 2497) for more
readable conditional pattern matching. This eliminates nested if-let
blocks in favor of flat, sequential conditions.

Changes:
- Refactor empty input handling with combined option/validation check
- Simplify numeric input parsing with inline bounds checking
- Streamline default value display with let-chain for show_default

Also updates is_leap_year() to use is_multiple_of() for clearer intent
in leap year calculation logic.

These are pure refactors with no behavioral changes - all existing
tests continue to pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
